title: Form Event Schema
description: Schema representing form/field events and their triggered actions

id.title: Event ID
id.description: Unique identifier for the event (kebab-case recommended)

type.title: Trigger Type
type.description: Type of event that triggers the actions. onSubmit fires when form is submitted, onBlur when field loses focus, onChange when field value changes, onFocus when field gains focus, onPageLoad when page loads

field.title: Field Name
field.description: Field key that triggers the event (required for field-level triggers like onBlur, onChange, onFocus; not used for onSubmit and onPageLoad)

actions.title: Event Actions
actions.description: Actions to execute when event is triggered

type.title: Action Type
type.description: Type of action to execute. methodCall calls a backend method, showMessage displays a message to user, navigateTo navigates to a URL, resetForm clears all form values, setFieldValue sets a field's value, updateFieldOptions updates dropdown/checkbox options

method.title: Method Name
method.description: Full method path to call (e.g., 'UiControllerService.getCountries', 'EmployeeApi.createEmployee'). Used with methodCall action

args.title: Method Arguments
args.description: Arguments to pass to the method. Supports template expressions like {{form.fieldName}} to reference form field values

onSuccess.title: Success Actions
onSuccess.description: Array of actions to execute if the method call succeeds

onError.title: Error Actions
onError.description: Array of actions to execute if the method call fails

level.title: Message Level
level.description: Severity level for showMessage action. success for positive actions, error for failures, warning for cautions, info for informational messages

message.title: Message Text
message.description: Message text to display to the user (for showMessage action)

url.title: Navigation URL
url.description: URL or route path to navigate to (for navigateTo action). Can be relative or absolute

field.title: Target Field
field.description: Field key (for setFieldValue or updateFieldOptions actions)

value.title: Field Value
value.description: Value to set for the target field (for setFieldValue action)
